title: taraxacum calabricum
intro: Taraxacum calabricum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. It is reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Taraxacum calabricum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum calabricum can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with various herbal preparations available for different health purposes.
